title: Col Coords
description: Mod will show your coordinates above HUD
body:
Col Coords adds a clean and convenient display of the player’s current coordinates (X / Y / Z) above your HUD, along with additional information such as view angle, inner time. Can be customized – text color, transparency, and even toggle individual elements on or off in real‑time.

Press 'm' for open config.

Press ' for toggle hud.
